calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Adam Lehman, is present.
Attorney, Russell K. Marne, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Tracy Rose & Gallery Flux, are not present.
(Default was entered on 8/10/07 as to both defendants)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Adam Lehman is sworn and examined by Russell K. Marne.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants, Tracy Rose & Gallery Flux, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for damages, the sum of $27,000.00, prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 10% in the sum of $1,902.00, and cost in the sum of $435.00 for a total Judgment of $29,337.00. Default Judgment by Court signed in open court.
